notes: MVRSD — Military Vehicle Remote Sensing Dataset. 3,000 Google-Earth chips (640x640, 0.3 m GSD) across 40+ military scenarios in Asia / North America / Europe; 32,626 labelled instances in 5 vehicle classes, plus 3 large unlabelled test rasters. The full imagery is account-locked (Baidu Cloud / SciDB) and CANNOT be fetched programmatically — supply it offline via the drop-in tree below. Only the official repo's demo.zip (12 images) and the community YOLO label port (full label set) are openly downloadable.
attribution: MVRSD (Google Earth imagery; baidongls/MVRSD). YOLO label port: Yusuf Ahmet Soylemez (MIT) — SkyTurk0/military-vehicle-detection.
license_notes: MVRSD imagery is derived from Google Earth and distributed for research only — verify redistribution rights with the dataset authors before baking into a shipped artifact. The community YOLO *label* port is MIT-licensed; the underlying imagery is NOT.
annotation_format: YOLO bbox (normalised cx,cy,w,h) per image; original is Pascal-VOC XML. Class index order follows MVRSD classes.txt: SMV=0, LMV=1, AFV=2, CV=3, MCV=4. The community repo data.yaml `names` list is in a different order and is INCONSISTENT with its own label indices — do not use it.

operator_steps: Acquire the full MVRSD archive from SciDB or Baidu Cloud (requires an account).
Extract so that images live under reference-corpora-input/mvrsd/images/{train,val}/ and labels under reference-corpora-input/mvrsd/labels/{train,val}/.
Run `docker compose build assets` (or the fetcher with --only mvrsd) to crop per-class reference chips.
For YOLO *training* (not the reference DB), stage with backend/scripts/stage_mvrsd.py instead — see docs.
